fact_nuggets.text: Hunger Switch (Japanese: Hunger Switch) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Morpeko.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Pokemon Legends: Z-A 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check for other moves/Abilities that can or cannot copy/replace/suppress this Ability. You can discuss this on the talk page. At the end of each turn, Hunger Switch switches a Morpeko with the Ability between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode. In Full Belly Mode, Aura Wheel is an Electric-type move; in Hangry Mode, it is a Dark-type move. Entrainment and Role Play fails if the user has Hunger Switch. Hunger Switch cannot be copied by Trace or traded by Wandering Spirit . Power of Alchemy and Receiver cannot be replaced by Hunger Switch. If Morpeko's Hunger Switch is negated or replaced, it remains in its current form. If a Pokemon other than Morpeko obtains Hunger Switch with Transform or Imposter , the Pokemon will not change forms. Hunger Switch does not activate while Morpeko is Terastallized . While Terastallized, Morpeko does not change forms even when switched out. Pokemon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] In Pokemon Legends: Z-A , Abilities do not occur in normal gameplay. However, Morpeko will change between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode upon using Aura Wheel. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Hunger Switch has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check for other moves/Abilities that can or cannot copy/replace/suppress this Ability. You can discuss this on the talk page. At the end of each turn, Hunger Switch switches a Morpeko with the Ability between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode. In Full Belly Mode, Aura Wheel is an Electric-type move; in Hangry Mode, it is a Dark-type move. Entrainment and Role Play fails if the user has Hunger Switch. Hunger Switch cannot be copied by Trace or traded by Wandering Spirit . Power of Alchemy and Receiver cannot be replaced by Hunger Switch. If Morpeko's Hunger Switch is negated or replaced, it remains in its current form. If a Pokemon other than Morpeko obtains Hunger Switch with Transform or Imposter , the Pokemon will not change forms. Hunger Switch does not activate while Morpeko is Terastallized . While Terastallized, Morpeko does not change forms even when switched out. Pokemon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] In Pokemon Legends: Z-A , Abilities do not occur in normal gameplay. However, Morpeko will change between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode upon using Aura Wheel.
Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode
